vulnerabilities.title: SQL Injection Risk Pattern
vulnerabilities.fix: Use parameterized queries and strict validation

vulnerabilities.title: API Key Exposure Pattern
vulnerabilities.impact: Unauthorized API usage and data abuse
vulnerabilities.fix: Move secrets to server-side env and rotate keys

steps.text: Scanning target surface and endpoint map...
Simulated SQL injection path identified in auth flow.
Simulated auth bypass grants admin session token.
Privilege escalation reaches sensitive database tables.
Data exfiltration path possible in under 18 minutes.

simulation.explanation: Demo chain shows realistic compromise from weak auth + SQLi signals.

report.executiveSummary: Demo startup is exposed to high-risk account and data compromise vectors.
criticalFindings: Weak Authentication Flow: Account takeover and admin compromise
SQL Injection Risk Pattern: Database read/write compromise
actions: Use parameterized queries and strict validation
